name: Assassin Animals
objective: Control an assassin animal character to defeat enemies and complete the level objective.
controls: WASD or Arrow Keys to move. Space or mouse click to attack. Look for on-screen prompts.
win_condition: Eliminate all enemies or reach the level exit without dying.
avoid: Taking too many hits from enemies. Falling into hazards.
tips: Find and click the Start or Play button first. During gameplay attack enemies before they reach you. On game_over look for Retry or Restart button.
